ordinanceLabel: Walnut Municipal Code · eCode360 (WA5028) — through Ord. 25-05 (Oct. 8, 2025)
fireAgency: Los Angeles County Fire Department (LACoFD — contract city)
buildingCodeModel: LA County Title 26 (2021 IBC / 2023 LA County BC) adopted by reference
permitPortalNote: No online portal. In-person counter only at City Hall — 21201 La Puente Road, Walnut, CA 91789. Mon–Thu 7am–6pm (4/10, closed Fridays).
